profile.name: Gokul
profile.title: Full-Stack Developer & AI Engineer
profile.tagline: Building the future, one line of code at a time
profile.bio: A passionate developer focused on creating innovative solutions at the intersection of AI and web technologies. I specialize in building robust, scalable applications with modern frameworks and cloud-native architectures.

projects.title: CORTEX CLI
projects.description: An open-source AI-powered CLI tool for software engineering tasks. Features intelligent code generation, multi-provider support, and extensible agent architecture.

projects.title: Marine Odyssey
projects.description: An immersive marine life exploration platform with interactive 3D visualizations and real-time ocean data integration.

projects.title: Scrapling Server
projects.description: High-performance web scraping infrastructure with anti-bot bypass capabilities, proxy management, and structured data extraction.

projects.title: Lightpanda Browser
projects.description: A lightweight, privacy-focused browser automation tool for testing and web scraping at scale.

experience.description: Leading development of AI-powered developer tools and CLI applications.
Built scalable web applications with React, Node.js, and cloud services.
Developed client projects across various industries and technologies.

testimonials.quote: Exceptional developer with a keen eye for detail and user experience.
